articles.title: The Scarcity Deception: How Globalist Cabal Engineers Health Scarcity to Control Populations
articles.summary: Natural News exposes how a small cabal of globalists artificially engineers scarcity in health, energy, water and food to maintain control. The piece argues that abundance in these sectors is naturally occurring but systematically suppressed by coordinated efforts.

articles.title: APA Silences Hopkins Psychiatrist Mid-Speech After Human Rights Award
articles.summary: The American Psychiatric Association cut Dr. Mansoor Malik's microphone during his acceptance speech for a human rights award when he mentioned Gaza. This censorship reveals how professional medical organizations suppress dissenting voices even from their own award recipients.

articles.title: Zuckerberg Admits Meta Censorship Was Biased — But Don't Trust the 'Reform'
articles.summary: Mark Zuckerberg's January 2025 admission that Meta's fact-checking suppressed health freedom information confirms systemic censorship. Natural News warns this isn't genuine reform but strategic repositioning, as algorithms continue suppressing natural health content.

articles.title: House Readies $3.35 Billion War Chest for Next 'Global Health Threat' Orchestration
articles.summary: New House legislation allocates $3.35 billion for future 'global health threat' responses. The funding structure suggests preparation for orchestrated health emergencies rather than genuine public health preparedness.

articles.title: Meta Pays 'Momfluencer' Doctors to Whitewash Child Safety Record
articles.summary: Meta is paying Instagram influencer doctors, psychologists and college athletes with millions of followers to promote Teen Account safety features. The Tech Transparency Project exposes this astroturfing campaign to reshape Meta's child safety image through paid medical endorsements.

articles.title: Medicaid Fraud Epidemic Rages Unchecked in Minnesota and California

articles.title: New Book Exposes Media's Role in Hyping 'Absurd on Its Face' Medical Research
